message:
fix: remove unused imports in explain_api and tighten substring matching in ledger_display

- Remove unused imports (ConfidenceViz, NaturalExplanation, FlipScenario) from explain_api.rs
- Fix categorize_feature() to use starts_with/contains("_io"/"_fd") instead of bare
  contains("io"/"fd") to avoid false positives on words like "ratio" or "afford"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
